subject: AWS billing statement for February 2026
body:
Dear Customer,

Your AWS billing statement for the period of February 1-28, 2026 is now available.

AWS billing: $156.00 for February

Service breakdown:
  EC2 instances: $89.00
  S3 storage: $32.00
  RDS databases: $25.00
  CloudFront: $10.00

Total charges: $156.00
Payment method: Corporate card ending in 4832

View your full invoice at https://console.aws.amazon.com/billing

Amazon Web Services
